modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need assistance with formatting text into columns in Word.

full_description_text: A field technician is trying to format text into columns within Word. They are unsure of the steps required to achieve this layout. The issue has arisen while working on a document that requires a specific presentation style.
short_description: Need assistance with formatting text into columns in Word.
description: A field technician is trying to format text into columns within Word. They are unsure of the steps required to achieve this layout. The issue has arisen while working on a document that requires a specific presentation style.
